title: GEAS Memory Update
description: Per-mission change log recording what this mission's consolidating phase did to shared memory (memory/shared.md). Canonical shared-memory content lives in shared.md; this artifact records which entries were added, modified, or removed and why. Agent-memory changes are written directly to each agent's memory file and do not produce a change log.

mission_id.description: Mission whose consolidating phase produced this change log.

added.description: Shared-memory entries newly introduced during this mission's consolidating phase.

modified.description: Existing shared-memory entries whose text or scope was changed.

removed.description: Shared-memory entries removed or marked deprecated. An entry replaced by a new one is represented as a 'removed' entry plus an 'added' entry that references the prior memory_id in its reason.

memory_id.description: Stable identifier for the shared-memory entry in shared.md.

reason.description: Why this entry was added or modified.

evidence_refs.description: Paths to evidence or deliberation artifacts that motivated the change.
